subject: Re: Trans. : little saint-james SPA and samples of terrazzo for floors
body:
this is silly..... how can there be no doors  shutting
the corridor.WHen someone comes out of the shower they
look down the passageway at the staff, or others...
please have someone pay closer attention... the toilet
room has bben made narrow nad ugly,, there should be
shelves all around , two sinks against the long wall
and a wc closet...and if I might request at least for
the fifth time.. can we either put in dimesions or
give me a scale...   I do not want to see drawings
without one or the othe unles they are very small... 
also can you send me the proposed elevation of the
garden between the current library and the pool
house.. is it raised,, how much.. if the terrace of
the house is 56 , the garden is at ?  

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

> Dear Jeffrey,
> Here is the floor plan according to your sketch, I
> think it works 
> pretty well.what do you think of the terrazzo for
> the vestibules and 
> the gallery floors?
> I will contact Sarah for visiting your apartement on
> Monday.Thanks,J.P.
> 
> 
> 
> 
> 
> 
>
